Event: Titanic Excavation - Apr 16 2026
Event Date: 16/04/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: AM337
Secrets of the Dungeon Amulet

Once every 3 sec., the unit throws a candy at the allied unit with the lowest current health. The candy removes 2 negative effects from the target, restores 15% health to it and reduces incoming damage against it by 15% for 4 sec. Stacks up to 4 times.

Once in a while, the unit goes into a candy frenzy for 6 sec. During this time, the unit throws candy once every 2 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
